case_title: GUANGTAI LI VS. SEAN JAMES NISIADAMS

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,110.00 FILED BY LI, GUANGTAI AS TO DEFENDANT NISIADAMS, SEAN JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-27-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, GUANGTAI AS TO DEFENDANT NISIADAMS, SEAN JAMES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-13-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NISIADAMS, SEAN JAMES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-27-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, GUANGTAI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NISIADAMS, SEAN JAMES $552.12 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $597.12, BASED ON THE EVIDENCE, THE COURT FINDS THE DEFENDANT AT FAULT FOR THE CAR ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-27-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-27-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF GUANGTAI LI IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER YAN GIAO LI, DAUGHTER ALSO ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT SEAN JAMES NISIADAMS IS NOT PRESENT. MS. LI WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY THE COURTROOM CLERK. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
